attacking_style: Does not appear to be a primary attacker; functions in a support role with contributions coming late in efforts after teammates have already initiated moves.
team_tactics: Deployed as secondary domestique in coordinated family/team efforts, working after lead domestiques (e.g., ANACONA) have already set tempo for protected rider QUINTANA Nairo.
terrain_preference: Limited data, but appears functional on climbs in support capacity; descending skills questionable based on tactical positioning issues.
vulnerability: Poor descending positioning and tactical decision-making evident; struggles with chase coordination and may create confusion when given leadership responsibilities.
key_patterns: Functions as secondary support rider behind primary domestiques in team hierarchy (2 observations)
Deployed in coordinated support with sibling Nairo Quintana across different teams (2 observations)
Shows tactical uncertainty when positioned beyond pure domestique role (2 observations)
form_trajectory: unknown: observations span 2018-2020 with no GC ambitions shown; role unchanged as team support rider
